name: key-value
description: A read-only two-column table of key -> value pairs, the detail-page primitive Filament's KeyValueEntry needs (a resolved map shown as a small ruled table inside an infolist). An empty map renders the header row only. Plain HTML + Tailwind + --lv-* tokens, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the key-value partial to your JTE root at lievit/key-value.jte, reached as @template.lievit.key-value(pairs=..., keyLabel=..., valueLabel=...). Pass an already-projected ordered Map<String,String> (the read side resolves it). The source is yours: edit freely.
